TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tom_Black, title = Tom_Black, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tom_Black} }

S.FORM: Tom Black sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1941, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 7, Tom Black, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tom Black sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1941, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 7, Tom Black, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tom βlaʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tom βlaʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
